topic: Social media comments are data — but most brands still can't read them
caption:
Hundreds of comments are posted about your brand every single day.

But how many are actually read? Analyzed? Turned into action?

Teams using Commento quickly realize: comments aren't just feedback — they carry purchase intent, complaint signals, early crisis warnings, and genuine brand love.

AI separates these signals in milliseconds. So you can focus on the right comment at the right moment.

Ready to start reading your comment data?
design_headline: Your comments are talking. Are you listening?
design_subhead: Uncover the intent behind every comment with AI.

topic: Kriz sinyalleri yorumlarda gizlidir — ama çoğu marka çok geç fark eder
caption:
Büyük krizlerin %80'i önce yorum bölümünde başlar.

Tek bir viral şikayet değil — benzer tonu taşıyan 12-15 yorum, aynı saatte, farklı platformlarda.

Commento bu paterni görür. Siz görmeden önce.

Kriz erken uyarı sistemi böyle çalışır.
design_subhead: Siz fark etmeden önce AI görür.
stat_label: Büyük krizler önce yorum bölümünde sinyal verir

topic: Crisis signals hide in comments — most brands notice too late
caption:
80% of major brand crises start in the comment section.

Not one viral complaint — but 12–15 comments with the same tone, same hour, across different platforms.

Commento spots the pattern. Before you do.

This is what early crisis detection actually looks like.
design_subhead: AI sees it before you do.
stat_label: Major crises first signal in comment sections
